original_statement: what is on the observe side of the coin with the least value?
mutated_statement: what is on the regarded side of the something with the least value?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Entity generalization: "observe" replaced by "regarded" | "coin" replaced by "something" (observe→regarded | coin→something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和chain中的内容可识别关键信息：(1) agent在chain的thought写明“The least value is 1 seniti. The regarded side (obverse) of the 1 seniti shows maize...”，judge_thought也直接确认“Prediction Answer 'maize' matches the table”。(2) 该表述中没有任何对问题模糊性的提示、澄清请求或不确定性措辞，agent直接将“regarded side”映射为“obverse”并给出具体答案。(3) 因此agent未表现出对原问题中替换后的歧义或不确定性的意识，直接按自身理解处理问题并返回确定性答案，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
